title: Faithless PvP Edit
body:
# Faithless PvP Edit

**DISCLAIMER THIS PACK DOES NOT USE ANY FAITHLESS TEXTURES OR FILES!** It simply overrides some of the files with my own to make it optimized for PvP! You need the Faithless Texturepack in order for it to work, also make sure that my pack is above the Faithless one in your Minecraft Resource Pack settings in order for it to work!

## What does this pack do?
1. it fixes the lefthanded and offhand weapons/items that Faithless had back to normal.
2. It adds back the default explosion sound
3. Added Lower Fire
4. Changed the totem of undying back to default
5. Reduced Particles

- There is a problem with left handed weapons that I'll hopfully fix soon!

<details>
<summary>Why I'm Not Using Any Faithless Textures/Files</summary>

Due to Faithless's ARR(All Rights Reserved) Liscense I cannot use any of their textures, so this pack simply overrides some of the files with my own.

</details>
